violations.text: Sponges and containers were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

(Queso cheese ) was observed held at (66) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

(Cheese and deli meat) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
(Various food product) were observed stored on the floor in the (throughout establishment ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food prep shelves and chest freezers ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
The ceiling in the (back kitchen ) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The floors in the (back kitchen) are constructed of (concrete) which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
Various food product and beverages were observed stored on the floor in the throughout the establishment. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The ceilings in the back kitchen and retail area is in poor repair(missing tiles and/or water stains). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The ceilings in walk in cooler has an small accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The floors in the back kitchen and storage area under food storage racks have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The ceiling in the bathroom area is in poor repair(observed a leak). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
